name: keycast
description: Keycast is a secure key management system for teams on Nostr.

scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:password@localhost/keycast REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379 RUST_LOG=debug,hyper=info,h2=info,rustls=info,sqlx=info,nostr_relay_pool=info MASTER_KEY_PATH=./master.key ENABLE_EXAMPLES=true ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174,http://localhost:3000 SERVER_NSEC=e870badb3c21ac7b6d7e9529b5214d39b270f96a7e1c6bb34d9ffab430d272a4 WEB_BUILD_DIR=./web/build cargo run --bin keycast
scripts.check: cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings -A deprecated && cargo test --workspace
